evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring. While the linked use case mentions that AI proctoring flags if a candidate looks away too long, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm the implementation of live monitoring or AI proctoring as a fully functional feature. This leads to a gap in the requirement as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API reads confirming the implementation of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for proctoring implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls and checks that verify the functionality of live proctor monitoring and AI proctoring.
